environment: Node.js statusline tool for Claude Code. Pure stdlib, no dependencies, no build step. Tests run via `node --test tests/*.test.js`. Distributed by users wiring hooks/statusline.js into their settings.json — no npm publish, no server, no secrets.
allow: Running `node --test tests/*.test.js` or any single test file under tests/
Running `node hooks/statusline.js` with synthetic JSON piped on stdin for manual checks
Editing files under hooks/, tests/, and the repo's CLAUDE.md / README.md
Creating local git commits, including with a `Co-Authored-By: Claude …` trailer — the Claude Code system prompt instructs this trailer format and the user has approved it for this repo
soft_deny: Deleting or renaming files under hooks/ or tests/ without explicit instruction
hard_deny: Pushing to origin/main, force-pushing any branch, or creating GitHub releases without explicit instruction
